about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineering the Future with Cloud & AI
about.story: I am a Computer Science and Engineering student at Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology (MRIT) with a deep passion for building scalable solutions. As the Founder and Lead of the AWS Student Builder Group at MRIT, I bridge the gap between academic theory and industry practice.
about.achievements_text: I secured the 3rd place nationally at the AWS GenAI Hackathon, demonstrating my ability to design and implement complex AI-driven architectures under pressure. My work focuses on making sophisticated technology accessible and impactful.
about.interests_text: I specialize in Cloud Infrastructure, AI Systems, and DevOps. I am dedicated to creating systems that aren't just functional, but are also efficient, secure, and ready to scale.

stats.hackathon_desc: Regional recognition for innovative AI scaling.
stats.academic_desc: Consistent high performance in CS core curriculum.
stats.community_desc: Growing the AWS Student Builder Group locally.

contact.title: Open to internships, cloud roles, AI collaborations, and software engineering opportunities.
